creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
In ports eb66f4658087fd0fe83d8f5c30fa084f95c58c2b, an entry to VuXML was added for www/firefox, www/firefox-esr, and mail/thunderbird (vuxml update committed Dec 10).

The CVEs documented in that commit were fixed for thunderbird 128.5.0 (note that the current mail/thunderbird port is 128.5.1 as of Dec 10).

I believe the mail/thunderbird vuxml entry should be changed from '< 133' to '< 128.5'.

Here are the relevant mozilla security advisory references (dated Nov 26):
https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/security/advisories/mfsa2024-67/
https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/security/advisories/mfsa2024-68/
